summary: Tested admin dashboard enhancements and wallet payment features. Fixed critical bug in stripe_payments.py where get_current_user dependency was missing. Backend API tests pass 16/19 (3 skipped due to non-admin user). Frontend components exist with correct data-testids.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: stripe_payments.py was missing get_current_user dependency function causing 404s for new endpoints (bl-coins/purchase-from-balance, subscriptions/subscribe-from-balance, subscriptions/current)
Admin membership endpoints (/api/admin/membership/tiers, /promo-codes, /transactions) all working and return correct 401/403 for unauthenticated requests
Wallet.jsx has both Top Up BL Coins section (data-testid='topup-coins-section') and Membership Subscriptions section (data-testid='membership-section') permanently visible
BL_COIN_PACKAGES array includes 4 tiers: Starter (30k/$4.99), Value (80k/$9.99), Pro (400k/$14.99), Premium (1m/$29.99)
MEMBERSHIP_TIERS includes all 4 tiers: Bronze ($4.99), Silver ($9.99), Gold ($14.99), Diamond ($29.99)

test_credentials.note: Test user from previous iteration - not admin so admin-only tests skipped

context_for_next_testing_agent: Fixed missing get_current_user dependency in stripe_payments.py. All payment endpoints now accessible. Admin endpoints require admin authentication - test with admin user if available.

admin_membership_tiers_api.status: Working - returns 401/403 without auth, requires admin role

admin_promo_codes_api.status: Working - returns 401/403 without auth, requires admin role

admin_transactions_api.status: Working - returns 401/403 without auth, requires admin role

features: Purchase BL coins using USD balance

subscription_from_balance.status: Working - returns 401 without auth, validates tier

subscription_current.status: Working - returns 401 without auth, 404 if no subscription
